hooks.command: FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && [[ "$FILE" == *.ts || "$FILE" == *.vue ]]; then pnpm eslint --fix "$FILE" 2>&1 | tail -5; fi
hooks.description: Auto-fix ESLint sur le fichier modifié uniquement

hooks.command: input=$(cat); tool=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_name // empty'); block=false; if [ "$tool" = "Read" ]; then file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); base="${file##*/}"; [[ "$base" =~ ^\.env ]] && block=true; elif [ "$tool" = "Glob" ]; then pat=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.pattern // empty'); echo "$pat" | grep -qE '(^|/)\.env' && block=true; fi; [ "$block" = true ] && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Fichiers .env bloques par hook de securite"}}'
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git commit'; then pnpm lint 2>&1 | tail -20; fi
